name: infra-audit
description: >- Reads docker-compose, env files, ORM configs, and connection strings to map current infrastructure. Flags missing layers (cache, queue, analytics) based on observed access patterns. Outputs a structured infrastructure manifest.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 它能自动解析各类配置来梳理现有架构，帮你发现系统中缺失的基础组件，非常适合排查架构漏洞或生成全局清单。
